workspaceOpen.command: cat >/dev/null; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH"; { PYTHONPATH="${CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/sr-search/src" uv run --project "${CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/sr-search" --no-sync --no-config python -m stockroom shim rectify --owner cursor --app-dir "${CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/sr-search"; stockroom dashboard; } >/dev/null || true
